summary: Phase 2 Universal Document Extraction testing completed. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed 'Extract Document Data' option appears in dropdown for DBS, RTW, ID requirements and DocumentExtractionReview modal opens correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 - Olakunle Alonge) with uploaded DBS, RTW, ID documents for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Universal Document Extraction fully tested. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/documents/{id}/extract triggers extraction for DBS, RTW, ID documents, (2) DBS extraction extracts certificate_number, issue_date, disclosure_type, expiry_date, (3) RTW extraction extracts holder_name, document_type, document_number, nationality, expiry_date, permission_end_date, (4) ID extraction extracts holder_name, document_type, document_number, date_of_birth, issue_date, expiry_date, (5) GET /api/documents/{id}/extraction returns extraction record with correct fields, (6) POST /api/documents/{id}/extraction/review applies correct fields based on document type, (7) Frontend 'Extract Document Data' option appears in dropdown for DBS, RTW, ID requirements (data-testid: more-actions-{requirement_id}), (8) DocumentExtractionReview modal opens when clicking 'Extract Document Data'.

dbs_extraction_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/extract returns extraction with certificate_number, issue_date, disclosure_type, expiry_date fields

rtw_extraction_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/extract returns extraction with holder_name, document_type, document_number, nationality, expiry_date, permission_end_date fields

id_extraction_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/extract returns extraction with holder_name, document_type, document_number, date_of_birth, issue_date, expiry_date fields

get_extraction_endpoint.details: GET /api/documents/{id}/extraction returns extraction record or 'not_extracted' status

review_extraction_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/extraction/review accepts approve, edit_and_approve, reject actions

pending_reviews_endpoint.details: GET /api/extractions/pending-review returns list of extractions awaiting review

frontend_extract_option_dbs.details: DBS Certificate dropdown shows 'Extract Document Data' option

frontend_extract_option_rtw.details: Right to Work Documents dropdown shows 'Extract Document Data' option

frontend_extraction_modal.details: DocumentExtractionReview modal opens with correct title and 'Extract Document Data' button

frontend_features_tested: Extract Document Data dropdown option for DBS
Extract Document Data dropdown option for RTW
